properties.description: Reteti takes in orphaned and abandoned elephant calves with an aim to release them back into the wild herds adjoining the Sanctuary.
properties.description:it: Reteti accoglie elefanti orfani e abbandonati con l'obiettivo di rilasciarli nelle mandrie selvagge adiacenti al Santuario.
properties.name: Reteti Elephant Sanctuary
